rationale: The "satisfying pour into labeled jar" hook belongs to the kitchen-organization/restock genre — its pastel pink palette, domestic 3D kitchen setting, and pantry-labeling concept have zero visual or mechanical overlap with Bounce Blast 3D's dark/purple physics-puzzle DNA (no jars, no pours, no pantry — the satisfaction comes from ball-bounce chain reactions on a grid). The only thread of fit is a partial audience overlap (25–55 casual women who enjoy ASMR-style satisfaction content), but reusing this creative would mislead users and tank IPM/D1. Recommend NOT adapting this archetype directly; instead, borrow only the abstracted "satisfaction pour/fill" pacing structure and re-skin it natively as balls cascading to fill/clear the grid in the game's own palette.
